basic_details.job_title: NEIGRIHMS Executive Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: North Eastern Indira Gandhi Regional Institute of Health and Medical Sciences Shillong (NEIGRIHMS)
basic_details.short_information: North Eastern Indira Gandhi Regional Institute of Health and Medical Sciences Shillong (NEIGRIHMS) Executive Engineer Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of NEIGRIHMS. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NEIGRIHMS Executive Engineer Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 56 years. Age relaxation will be as per the rules of the Government of India for deputation posts.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor Degree in Civil Engineering from a recognized University
qualification.details: Executive Engineer (Civil): Bachelor Degree in Civil Engineering from a recognized University or institute with 07 years' practical experience in planning, designing, and construction work.

salary_details.details: The selected candidate will be placed at Level 11 of the Pay Matrix.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NEIGRIHMS Executive Engineer Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NEIGRIHMS Executive Engineer (Civil) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the NEIGRIHMS Executive Engineer (Civil) recruitment is 15th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Executive Engineer (Civil) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Executive Engineer (Civil) post in NEIGRIHMS.

faq.question: Q3. What is the required qualification for the Executive Engineer (Civil) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelor Degree in Civil Engineering from a recognized University or institute with 07 years of practical experience in planning, designing, and construction work.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Executive Engineer (Civil) position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Executive Engineer (Civil) post is 56 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Executive Engineer (Civil) post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will be appointed at Level 11 of the Pay Matrix.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for NEIGRIHMS Executive Engineer (Civil) recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for General/OBC and SC/ST categories.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Executive Engineer (Civil) post?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on Deputation (ISTC)/Promotion.

faq.question: Q9. Where should the application form be sent?
faq.answer: The completed application form should be sent to the address mentioned in the official notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.

faq.question: Q10. What is the location of NEIGRIHMS?
faq.answer: NEIGRIHMS is located in Shillong, Meghalaya, with the pincode 793018.
